name: list_conversations
description: List and search conversations for a website. Supports filtering by status, assignee, and full-text search across messages.

parameters.name: website_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your Crisp website.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number for pagination, starting at 1.

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Full-text search query to filter conversations by message content.

parameters.name: search_type
parameters.description: Type of search filter. One of: text, segment, filter.

data.last_message: I need help with my billing
